headline: deleting stale docs is half of context engineering
sub: An agent kept citing an abandoned setup guide. What you remove matters as much as what you write.

headline: stale context looks like a confident wrong answer
sub: An agent quoted a runbook we'd already killed. No error, no flag, just wrong with conviction.

headline: distrust is a requirements doc in disguise
sub: Build to your seniors' spec: review gates, scoped permissions, observability. Their skepticism is the checklist.

headline: a demo and production are different sports
sub: Most AI initiatives die in that gap. A demo runs once clean; production runs on your mess, unattended.

headline: copilot is ~5%, the work is the other 95%
sub: Autocomplete is the small part. Agents doing whole units of work in production are where the value and the risk live.
